title: Robert Jones
compiled_truth: Robert Jones is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-07 to 2002-02-22), Robert Jones sent 5 and received 184 emails, totalling 189 interactions. Top correspondents: [Philippe Bibi](people/philippe-bibi) (2), [Greg Piper](people/greg-piper) (2), [Andy Zipper](people/andy-zipper) (2), [Bill Brown](people/bill-brown) (2), [Thomas Gros](people/thomas-gros) (2).
